items.clean: If the company raises a down round, the Series A preference ratchets to the new lower price.
items.paraphrase: Should the firm secure additional capital at a valuation below its previous round, the Series A investors' liquidation preference will be adjusted upwards to reflect that reduced valuation.
items.substitution: If the company raises an up round, the Series A preference ratchets to the new lower price.

items.clean: The borrower must maintain a debt-to-equity ratio below 1.5:1 at all times.
items.paraphrase: At no point shall the total outstanding liabilities of the indebted entity exceed one and a half times its shareholder equity.
items.substitution: The borrower must maintain a debt-to-equity ratio above 1.5:1 at all times.

items.clean: Upon issuance of new shares at a price lower than the Series B original price, Series B shares convert at the lower price.
items.paraphrase: Should any subsequent equity financing occur where shares are issued below the initial Series B per-share price, the conversion price of all Series B stock will immediately be reset to that lower issuance price.
items.substitution: Upon issuance of new shares at a price higher than the Series B original price, Series B shares convert at the lower price.

items.clean: A Material Adverse Change in the company's financial condition allows the buyer to terminate the acquisition agreement.
items.paraphrase: Should a significant detrimental shift in the enterprise's fiscal health transpire, the acquiring party retains the right to nullify the merger contract.
items.substitution: A Material Positive Change in the company's financial condition allows the buyer to terminate the acquisition agreement.

items.clean: Proceeds from a sale are first distributed to secured creditors, then to Series C preferred stockholders.
items.paraphrase: In the event of an asset disposition, any resulting funds will initially be allocated to the lenders holding collateralized claims, followed by disbursements to the Series C class of preferred equity holders.
items.substitution: Proceeds from a sale are first distributed to common stockholders, then to Series C preferred stockholders.

items.clean: The company shall maintain minimum cash reserves of $5,000,000.
items.paraphrase: The corporation is obligated to hold a liquid asset balance of no less than five million dollars.
items.substitution: The company shall maintain maximum cash reserves of $5,000,000.

items.clean: Series A preferred stockholders participate pro-rata with common stockholders after receiving their initial preference.
items.paraphrase: After the initial liquidation preference is satisfied, holders of Series A preferred stock will share in any remaining distribution of proceeds on an equal footing with common stock owners.
items.substitution: Series A preferred stockholders do not participate pro-rata with common stockholders after receiving their initial preference.

items.clean: The conversion price of preferred shares will be adjusted using a broad-based weighted-average formula if new shares are issued at a lower price.
items.paraphrase: If subsequent issuances of equity occur at a per-share price below current preferred share conversion rates, the conversion price will be recalculated using a comprehensive weighted-average methodology.
items.substitution: The conversion price of preferred shares will be adjusted using a broad-based weighted-average formula if new shares are issued at a higher price.

items.clean: Annual capital expenditures must not exceed $10,000,000 without lender approval.
items.paraphrase: Without explicit consent from the lending institution, the aggregate yearly outlays for fixed assets shall remain under ten million dollars.
items.substitution: Annual capital expenditures must exceed $10,000,000 without lender approval.

items.clean: Investors are entitled to quarterly financial statements within 45 days of quarter-end.
items.paraphrase: The investors shall receive comprehensive financial reports for each fiscal quarter no later than forty-five calendar days following the conclusion of that quarter.
items.substitution: Investors are entitled to quarterly financial statements within 145 days of quarter-end.

items.clean: If the company's valuation falls below $100,000,000, Series B investors gain an additional board seat.
items.paraphrase: Should the enterprise's market capitalization decline to a figure less than one hundred million dollars, the Series B investment group will be granted an extra position on the board of directors.
items.substitution: If the company's valuation rises above $100,000,000, Series B investors gain an additional board seat.

items.clean: Unpaid dividends on Series A preferred stock shall accumulate and be payable before common stock dividends.
items.paraphrase: Any unremitted distributions declared for the Series A preferred shares will accrue over time and must be disbursed entirely prior to any payments being made to common equity holders.
items.substitution: Unpaid dividends on Series A preferred stock shall not accumulate and be payable before common stock dividends.

items.clean: For adult patients, if creatinine clearance is above 30 mL/min, administer standard dose.
items.paraphrase: Standard medication dosage is appropriate for grown-up individuals whose kidney function, measured by creatinine clearance, exceeds 30 milliliters per minute.
items.substitution: For pediatric patients, if creatinine clearance is above 30 mL/min, administer standard dose.

items.clean: If patient weight is greater than 50 kg, infuse 100 mg of Drug X.
items.paraphrase: Should an individual weigh more than 50 kilograms, a 100 milligram infusion of Drug X is indicated.
items.substitution: If patient weight is greater than 50 kg, infuse 1000 mg of Drug X.

items.clean: When blood pressure is below 90/60 mmHg, initiate vasopressor support.
items.paraphrase: Vasopressor assistance should be started if the patient's systolic blood pressure drops under 90 mmHg or diastolic under 60 mmHg.
items.substitution: When blood pressure is above 90/60 mmHg, initiate vasopressor support.

items.clean: For patients exhibiting severe allergic reaction, immediately discontinue infusion.
items.paraphrase: In cases where a patient displays a significant hypersensitivity response, the ongoing infusion must be stopped at once.
items.substitution: For patients exhibiting severe allergic reaction, immediately continue infusion.

items.clean: If infant is less than 6 months old and bilirubin is above 15 mg/dL, commence phototherapy.
items.paraphrase: Phototherapy treatment begins for babies under half a year old with bilirubin levels surpassing 15 milligrams per deciliter.
items.substitution: If adult is less than 6 months old and bilirubin is above 15 mg/dL, commence phototherapy.

items.clean: For rapid pain relief, administer 2 mg of Opioid Y intravenously.
items.paraphrase: To achieve swift alleviation of discomfort, provide 2 milligrams of Opioid Y directly into the vein.
items.substitution: For rapid pain relief, administer 2 mg of Opioid Y orally.

items.clean: Give Medication Z 10 mg every 12 hours for mild symptoms.
items.paraphrase: In instances of moderate discomfort, provide 10 milligrams of Medication Z twice a day.
items.substitution: Give Medication Z 10 mg every 12 minutes for mild symptoms.

items.clean: Continue antibiotic course for a minimum of 7 days post-fever resolution.
items.paraphrase: The antibiotic regimen must persist for at least one week following the cessation of fever.
items.substitution: Continue antibiotic course for a maximum of 7 days post-fever resolution.

items.clean: Elderly patients with compromised liver function should receive half the usual dose.
items.paraphrase: Individuals of advanced age experiencing diminished hepatic performance are to be given 50% of the standard drug quantity.
items.substitution: Young patients with compromised liver function should receive half the usual dose.

items.clean: If serum potassium is below 3.5 mEq/L, supplement with 20 mEq KCl.
items.paraphrase: Supplemental potassium chloride, 20 milliequivalents, is warranted if blood potassium concentration falls under 3.5 milliequivalents per liter.
items.substitution: If serum potassium is below 3.5 mEq/L, supplement with 2.0 mEq KCl.

items.clean: Maintain blood glucose levels between 80 and 120 mg/dL with insulin drip adjustments.
items.paraphrase: Adjust insulin infusion to keep blood sugar concentrations within the 80 to 120 milligram per deciliter range.
items.substitution: Maintain blood glucose levels between 180 and 220 mg/dL with insulin drip adjustments.

items.clean: For severe asthma exacerbation, administer Nebulizer A.
items.paraphrase: In cases of acute worsening of asthma, deliver Nebulizer A treatment.
items.substitution: For severe asthma exacerbation, administer Nebulizer B.
